description_long: This object is a halved papaya with a smooth, elongated oval shape and a slightly tapered end. The exterior skin is a muted yellow-green, while the interior flesh is a vibrant orange-pink, surrounding a central cavity densely packed with small, round, black seeds. The cut surface reveals the juicy, fibrous texture of the fruit, contrasting with the glossy, almost gelatinous appearance of the seeds. The skin appears unblemished and matte, with a subtle sheen, and the overall form is plump and naturalistic. The papaya is shown in isolation, with no visible context or supporting objects. Its size and detailing suggest it is a fresh, ripe specimen suitable for consumption.
description: A halved, ripe papaya with orange-pink flesh and a central cluster of black seeds, featuring a smooth yellow-green skin and juicy interior.
description_view_0: The papaya is shown cut open lengthwise, displaying its orange-pink flesh and densely packed black seeds.
description_view_1: A side profile of the papaya reveals the smooth, curved yellow-green skin and the thickness of the fruit.
description_view_2: The uncut back of the papaya is visible, showing the full extent of its smooth, yellow-green exterior.
description_view_3: Another side profile, this time with a partial view of the cut surface and the seed cavity, as well as the skin.
attribute_ripeness_stage: Ripe, as indicated by the orange-pink flesh and the yellow-green skin with no visible green patches.
attribute_placement_or_context_within_th: The papaya is isolated with no visible supporting surface or surrounding objects.
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: The papaya is completely isolated from any other objects in the scene.
